It integrates DfT STATS19 records, OpenStreetMap geometry, and traffic volume data across 43,903 grid cells to predict segment-level collision probability. Achieves R² of 0.4089 on 2023-2024 holdout data. Designed for driver assistance, fleet management, and safety analytics.
